title: TraceGradeState
description: Output of Phase 2 verification. Written to state/trace-grade.json. Read by the agent for stop/continue decision and by downstream skills.

session_id.description: The session from the smoke run.

errored_events.description: Count of events with non-null error field.

deepest_llm_depth.description: Nesting depth of the deepest model event. <=2 good; >4 means LLM calls are deeply hidden.

grade.description: pass = proceed to Phase 3, fail = circle back, partial = surface issues to user.

grade_notes.description: One-line summary of the qualitative assessment.

failure_reasons.description: Specific issues found. Empty on pass.
